title: crataegus × media var. sicula
intro: Crataegus × media var. sicula, also known as hawthorn, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, specifically a variety of the Midwestern hawthorn native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus × media var. sicula include lowering blood pressure, improving heart health, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. It can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or tinctures, making it a popular supplement for heart health and overall well-being.
